extraction_instructions:
WORKFLOW FOR EXTRACTORS
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
Each record in this source is one web-browsing task.

Step 1 — Read the task
  Open the record and read task_summary carefully.
  Note the scoring criteria and max points.

Step 2 — Visit the websites and collect data
  Browse the web to complete the task.
  Keep note of every URL you visit.

Step 3 — Fill in your findings
  Download the record JSON (or copy the template).
  Fill ONLY these fields — leave all others as-is:
    • extracted_answer  — your complete answer
    • urls_visited      — list of all URLs you visited
    • primary_url       — the main site/tool used
    • data_extracted    — specific data points found (prices, names, dates, etc.)
    • extraction_notes  — any blockers or caveats (CAPTCHAs, paywalls, missing data)
    • extraction_complete — set to true when done

Step 4 — Upload the completed JSON
  Go back to the source in .
  Upload your filled JSON file — it replaces the pre-filled template.

DO NOT change: task_id, benchmark, task_summary, criteria, num_criteria,
total_max_points, is_annotated, reference_answer, video_link
These are reference fields — read-only.

fields.name: task_id
fields.description: [READ-ONLY] Unique task ID from WebTailBench dataset

fields.name: task_summary
fields.description: [READ-ONLY] The complete task description — what the extractor must do

fields.name: criteria
fields.description: [READ-ONLY] Full scoring rubric with point values for each criterion

fields.name: total_max_points
fields.description: [READ-ONLY] Maximum score achievable for this task

fields.name: is_annotated
fields.description: [READ-ONLY] True if this task is marked as annotated in the dataset

fields.name: has_reference_answer
fields.description: [READ-ONLY] True if a reference answer exists (91 tasks have answers)

fields.name: reference_answer
fields.description: [READ-ONLY] Gold reference answer for calibration (where available)

fields.name: video_link
fields.description: [READ-ONLY] Video evidence link from the dataset

fields.name: extracted_answer
fields.description: EXTRACTOR: Your complete answer — include exact values, names, figures found

fields.name: urls_visited
fields.description: EXTRACTOR: All URLs visited to complete the task

fields.name: primary_url
fields.description: EXTRACTOR: The main website or tool used

fields.name: data_extracted
fields.description: EXTRACTOR: Specific data points found — prices, names, dates, scores, etc.

fields.name: extraction_notes
fields.description: EXTRACTOR: Blockers, CAPTCHAs, paywalls, or caveats encountered

fields.name: extraction_complete
fields.description: EXTRACTOR: Set true when task is complete and JSON is ready for review

fields.name: score_achieved
fields.description: REVIEWER: Points awarded — must be between 0 and total_max_points

fields.name: score_breakdown
fields.description: REVIEWER: Per-criterion breakdown e.g. 'Criterion 1: 3/4 — found correct URL'

fields.name: reviewer_notes
fields.description: REVIEWER: Overall evaluation, feedback, and reasoning
